---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# aer_simulator

## basic usage 

### create circ

```{python}
# creat the circ
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
from qiskit.visualization import plot_histogram
circ = QuantumCircuit(2, 2)
circ.x([0])
circ.h([1])
circ.swap(0, 1)
circ.measure([0, 1], [0, 1]) 
circ.draw()
```

```{python}
# transpiled the circ.
from qiskit_aer import Aer
from qiskit import transpile
backend = Aer.get_backend('aer_simulator') 
transpiled_circ = transpile(circ, backend) 
print("the depth of the transpiled circuit is:", transpiled_circ.depth())
transpiled_circ.draw()
```

### get the results

```{python}
# use backend to calculate and statistics.
from qiskit.visualization import plot_histogram
job = backend.run(transpiled_circ, shots=1024, memory=True) # save memory to show the real progress.
result = job.result()
counts = result.get_counts()
counts_int = counts.int_outcomes() # but to decimal
probs = {k: v / counts.shots() for k, v in counts.items()} # probs
memory = result.get_memory()
fig = plot_histogram(counts)
fig.show()
```

### parallel

>Aer spport to submit multiple circs

```{python}
circs = [circ, circ]
backend = Aer.get_backend('aer_simulator') 
transpiled_circs = transpile(circs, backend) 
job = backend.run(transpiled_circs, shots=1024, memory=False) 
results = job.result()
counts = result.get_counts(0) # which is the result of first circ
```

## Large params circuits

```{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit, transpile
from qiskit.circuit import ParameterVector
from qiskit_aer import AerSimulator
import numpy as np

theta = ParameterVector("theta", 3)

qc = QuantumCircuit(3)
qc.rx(theta[0], 0)
qc.ry(theta[1], 1)
qc.rz(theta[2], 2)
qc.cx(0, 1)
qc.cx(1, 2)
qc.measure_all()

# N 组参数，每组 3 个参数
N = 100
param_sets = np.column_stack([
    np.linspace(0, np.pi, N),
    np.linspace(0, np.pi / 2, N),
    np.linspace(0, 2 * np.pi, N),
])

sim = AerSimulator(
    method="statevector",
    device="CPU",      # 有 GPU 版 Aer 时可以改成 "GPU"
    precision="single",
)

tqc = transpile(qc, sim)

job = sim.run(
    tqc,
    shots=1024,
    parameter_binds=[{
        theta[0]: param_sets[:, 0],
        theta[1]: param_sets[:, 1],
        theta[2]: param_sets[:, 2],
    }] # Just a dic for a kind of params circuits
)

result = job.result()

counts_list = [
    result.get_counts(i)
    for i in range(N)
]
```
